sharedStateObservations.description: CLI commands use resolveJsonFlag() helper for consistent --json flag handling across root, group, and leaf levels
Commands use MaestroError with helpful hints for validation failures and user guidance
Mission IDs use format YYYY-MM-DD-### with zero-padded sequence numbers

notes: Mission lifecycle commands fully implemented with create, list, show, approve, reject, update
Supports both file and stdin input for mission creation
Proper state transition validation with helpful error messages
Human-readable and JSON output modes supported
All 440 tests passing including integration tests for mission commands
